function.name: create_class
function.description: Schedule a new class. Extract each field from the user's message as plain natural-language text — do NOT invent IDs, do NOT guess a date if unsure. Leave a field empty/omit it if the user did not mention it.

class_type.description: Class type name, e.g. 'Yoga Flow'. Omit if not mentioned.

location.description: Location name, e.g. 'Main Studio'. Omit if not mentioned.

instructor.description: Instructor name. Omit if not mentioned.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD, using the pre-computed dates from the system prompt. Leave empty if unsure.

start_time.description: Start time in HH:MM 24h format. Omit if not mentioned.

duration_minutes.description: Duration in minutes as a number. Omit if not mentioned.

capacity.description: Max number of clients. Omit if not mentioned.

function.name: cancel_class
function.description: Cancel a scheduled class. Identify the class by describing its type, date, and time.
